title: dryopteris oldhamii
intro: Dryopteris oldhamii, also known as the Chinese Lady Fern, is a species of fern native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries, valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and improving cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Dryopteris oldhamii are often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being dried for later use in soups and tonics.
